notes: setq()/setr() write the %q<digit> register as a side effect. setq() returns ""; setr() returns the value itself. Only digit registers %q0-%q9 are modeled (see RegisterFunctions javadoc) -- setq(a,text)/setr(a,text) (letter-named extended registers) are deliberately excluded, matching the divergence documented for dynamic-function-names.json.
